calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion And Motion To Reconsider The Ruling Of The Court Denying Alleged Deft'S Motion To Vacate And Void Default Judgment
Off Calendar May-27-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES- ATTY. GLEN M. NAVIS, TEL. NO. (707) 224-1821 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER.

RULING - THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANT ROSARIO PLATERO TORRES' Motion To Reconsider The Ruling Of The Court Denying Alleged Defendant'S Motion To Vacate And Void Default Judgment, THE COURT DENIES THIS FRIVOLOUS MOTION FOR RECONSIDERATION. DEFENDANT FAILS TO COMPLY WITH C C P SECTIONS 473(2)(B) OR 1008. Prevailing party is to submit a proposed form of order. Judge: Quentin Kopp, Reporter: Wendy Pun, CSR # 12891 =301/QK

MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND
Off Calendar Apr-30-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES- ROSARIO TORRES, TEL. NO. 516-6587, PLAINTIFF APPEARING IN PRO PER WITH THE HELP OF AN INTERPRETER LAURA DAVIS;
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER.

RULING - THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANT ROSARIO PLATERO TORRES' MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT AND DEFAULT JUDGMENT IS DENIED. DEFENDANT HAS NOT SHOWN EXCUSABLE NEGLECT, NOR HAS DEFENDANT INCLUDED THE REQUIRED RESPONSIVE PLEADING. Opposing party is to submit a proposed form of order. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR # 8189 = (301/PJB)
